self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep the shared Engine refactor honest by proving the staged Architecture refactor also preserves Discovery behavior.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result extends the focused staged Engine check with one Discovery control source.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, the staged Engine check covered Architecture and Runtime but relied on ad hoc discovery inspection for full-lane confidence.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future shared Engine refactors will fail quickly if they alter the default Discovery proof or integration behavior.

decision.rationale: The staged Engine verification is worth extending with one Discovery control case.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
